meta.tagline: A vision to foster a thriving arts scene in the heart of Bamfield.
meta.description: The Bamfield Arts Council is a volunteer-run society founded in 1994 to provide accessible and inclusive opportunities for artistic expression in Bamfield, BC.

hero.headline: A thriving arts scene in the heart of Bamfield.
hero.subhead: Founded in 1994, we’re a volunteer-run society creating accessible, inclusive opportunities for artistic expression on the west coast of Vancouver Island.

highlights.text: Workshops and programs open to the community.

highlights.title: Exhibitions
highlights.text: Exhibitions and community events throughout the year.

highlights.title: Inclusive access
highlights.text: Bringing equal access to the arts in a rural community.

about.title: About the Council
about.lede: Founded in 1994 by local artists and community members, the Bamfield Arts Council is a vibrant hub for artistic expression on the west coast of Vancouver Island.
body: Located in Bamfield, our society brings together people of all ages and backgrounds who share a love for the arts.
As a registered society, we are dedicated to providing accessible and inclusive opportunities for both emerging and established artists.
Our programs and events cater to many forms of artistic expression, from visual arts and sculpture to music, theater, and dance.
Throughout the year, we host workshops, exhibitions, and community events—many open to the public—so people can connect, collaborate, and explore their artistic passions.
We believe art has the power to transform lives and communities. Living in a rural community can make access to artistic opportunities challenging, and we work to bridge that gap.

items.title: All forms of expression
items.text: Programming across visual arts, sculpture, music, theater, dance, and more.

programs.note: Many programs and events are open to the public.

events.title: Events
events.intro: Upcoming event details will be posted here as they’re scheduled. In the meantime, here’s a community tradition connected to the Council.

items.title: Bamfield Craft Fairs (community tradition)
items.details: The Annual Art in the Park and Holiday Craft Fair has long been a cherished Bamfield tradition. Traditionally organized by the Bamfield Arts Council, the craft fairs are currently sponsored and hosted by the BCSA.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.intro: A glimpse of community moments and recent events.

cards.title: Become a member
cards.text: Membership keeps programs accessible and helps fund events, supplies, and visiting artists.

cards.title: Donate
cards.text: Donations help us offer workshops, exhibitions, and community events.

cards.title: Volunteer
cards.text: Help run events, hang exhibitions, or lend skills (design, admin, social media, grant writing).
